title: 30cm Bamboo Skewers – 3mm Thick, 150-Pack – Natural Bamboo Sticks for BBQ, Grilling, Fruit & Crafts – Food-Safe, Eco-Friendly & Compostable – Smooth & Strong
features: 30cm Length, 3mm Thickness – Lightweight & Reliable: Perfectly sized for grilling vegetables, meats, or marshmallows, with just the right balance of flexibility and strength.
150-Pack – Ideal for Parties & Catering: Whether for a summer BBQ, dessert display, or craft project, this value pack gives you 150 skewers ready to go.
Eco-Friendly & 100% Bamboo: Made from sustainably sourced bamboo, free from chemicals or dyes. These skewers are fully biodegradable and compostable.
Smooth, Splinter-Free Surface: Carefully polished for safe food use, with sharpened tips for easy loading of food items without soaking required.
Versatile for Kitchen & Crafts: Excellent for kebabs, chocolate fountains, hors d'oeuvres, school projects, plant support, and more.
description: IUIND Naturals Bamboo Skewers – 30cm x 3mm – Pack of 150 These premium bamboo skewers from IUIND Naturals are perfect for grilling, entertaining, and crafting. Measuring 30cm in length and 3mm in thickness, they’re ideal for a wide range of food and DIY uses. Why Choose IUIND Naturals? 30cm Long & 3mm Thick: Great for small to medium portions – ideal for home and professional use Eco-Friendly Bamboo: Sustainably harvested, compostable, and plastic-free Smooth & Safe: Polished for a splinter-free experience and safe to use with all foods Multi-Purpose: For BBQs, snacks, fruit platters, crafts, and garden projects What You Get: 150 x Bamboo Skewers Size: 30cm (12 inches) long, 3mm thick Packed in a sealed, hygienic pouch with IUIND Naturals branding Brand: IUIND Naturals 📦 Made in: China
